title: Proofy Image Storyboard E2E
intent: Image-only director workflow test for a four-scene Proofy fintech adventure storyboard. Create and select storyboard stills, bind character continuity references, verify review readiness, and stop before video generation.

character.name: Proofy
character.description: Playful flat illustrated fintech adventure mascot on warm cream paper.

scenes.title: Hook
scenes.description: Proofy stands at the edge of a warm cream-paper fintech dashboard world, holding a glowing receipt like a treasure map.
scenes.motionIntent: Locked-off establishing shot; Proofy looks from receipt to dashboard world.
scenes.prompt: Scene 0 hook still: Proofy stands at the edge of a warm cream-paper fintech dashboard world, holding a glowing receipt like a treasure map. Wide establishing storyboard frame, flat illustrated Pixar storyboard style, vivid primary accents, asymmetric playful composition, clean readable silhouette, no text or logos.

scenes.title: Discovery
scenes.description: Proofy kneels beside oversized colorful transaction tiles on cream paper, inspecting a tiny warning spark with a magnifying glass.
scenes.motionIntent: Gentle push-in; Proofy studies one warning spark and points to the next clue.
scenes.prompt: Scene 1 discovery still: Proofy kneels beside oversized colorful transaction tiles on cream paper, inspecting a tiny warning spark with a magnifying glass. Medium-wide storyboard frame, flat illustrated fintech adventure, warm off-white canvas, grass green, sky blue, ember orange and sunburst yellow accents, no text or logos.

scenes.title: Proof Moment
scenes.description: Proofy raises a bright green checkmark token above a small pile of gold coins while dashboard tiles rearrange neatly around them.
scenes.motionIntent: Hero beat; Proofy raises the token and the surrounding panels settle into order.
scenes.prompt: Scene 2 proof moment still: Proofy raises a bright green checkmark token above a small pile of gold coins while dashboard tiles rearrange neatly around them. Low-angle heroic storyboard frame, cream paper background, flat primary-color illustration, no readable text, no logos.

scenes.title: Handoff
scenes.description: Proofy rides a paper airplane made from a verified receipt across a warm cream fintech landscape, leaving colored stars and coins behind.
scenes.motionIntent: Lateral tracking handoff; receipt plane glides across the frame into the final open space.
scenes.prompt: Scene 3 handoff still: Proofy rides a paper airplane made from a verified receipt across a warm cream fintech landscape, leaving a small trail of colored stars and coins. Wide final storyboard frame, flat illustrated primary-color adventure, clean open space for motion, no text or logos.
